briefs.title: Council to vote on liquor licence for Solo Karaoke on Kingsway, Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on whether to recommend a liquor primary licence — a permit allowing a business to serve alcohol as its main activity — for Solo Karaoke at 6462 Kingsway. City staff, RCMP, and provincial inspectors investigated public concerns and found no evidence of illegal liquor service, and now recommend Council support the application.
briefs.action_required: Watch the March 10, 2026 Council meeting outcome if this licence decision affects your business or neighbourhood.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — Solo Karaoke liquor primary licence recommendation
